creator: freebsdml@marino.st
text:
I would recommend that this PR, "ports/142476: bsd.gnat.mk - improved 
Ada support for the ports system", be closed.

The submitter, Mark, has told me that he no longer has interest to add 
Ada ports to FreeBSD, or even maintain his existing one at 
lang/gnat-gcc44.  There won't be any future ports that will use bsd.gnat.mk.

-- John
